spec_match.rationale: The page now exercises preventScroll, focusVisible true/false/default, :focus, :focus-visible, and the newly-focused branch through a live workbench.

interactive.rationale: Adds real buttons, a checkbox, focus event outcomes, scroll measurement, and live readouts driven by actual focus() calls.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers fallback detection, repeat-focus on an already-focused target, non-focusable target behavior, and preventScroll before/after scroll positions.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5612989944299520 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: The static-card pattern is replaced with a variable-based workbench; local button styles set both background and color.

summary: The static reference page has been converted into an interactive focus option workbench that demonstrates focusVisible, preventScroll, newly-focused state, pseudo-class matching, and edge cases while preserving the reference tables.
